proposals.sql: SELECT * FROM match_result WHERE home_goals >= 3 AND home_goals > away_goals;
proposals.natural_language: Show matches where the home team scored at least 3 goals and won.

proposals.sql: SELECT * FROM match_result WHERE home_team = 'Liverpool' AND home_goals >= 2;
proposals.natural_language: Find Liverpool home games where they scored 2 or more goals.
